High-end Strategic Diagnostic

The Opportunity: The Auto Parts Retail Search Opportunity

Algolia customers see avg. +12% conversion uplift within 90 days.

© Algolia Confidential

Pilot Roadmap

1
Connect with Jamey Maki (VP eCommerce)
Send a 3-bullet personalized LinkedIn message: headlamp 23x gap, Duralast 2-result brand failure, ChatGPT NLP gap. No deck, no pricing. Reference the Q2 FY2026 catalog expansion quote as urgency context.
2
Technical Demo — AutoZone-Specific Queries
Demo framed around the 5 Phase 2 gaps: headlamp/headlight synonyms, Duralast brand intent, NLP query on 2019 Camry oil, federated 'return policy' search, and empty-state query suggestions. Show Algolia on AutoZone's actual query patterns.
3
CIO Architecture Meeting with Michelle Borninkhof
Architecture overview: API-first headless integration with existing React/Next.js/Contentstack stack. Reference McDonald's/Walmart Algolia-scale familiarity. Supply Chain 2030 completion as the transition hook.
4
CFO ROI Presentation for Jamere Jackson
Quantified model: $36.9M moderate annual revenue impact at ~3-month payback. Dual vector: revenue uplift + CAC reduction from reduced paid search dependency. Three analyst upgrades citing technology as growth catalyst.
5
Commercial Pilot — DIFM B2B Catalog
Propose a focused pilot on the AutoZonePro commercial catalog search. DIFM growing at +9.8% SSS — fastest-path ROI proof point. Part number exact match + account-aware pricing + fitment filtering.

4-week proof of value — measurable results before full commitment.

Financial Snapshot

Search-Addressable ~$369M [ESTIMATE — 15% of estimated ecommerce revenue; industry benchmark]
Conservative Lift ~$18.5M/yr [ESTIMATE — 5% lift on search-addressable revenue]
Search ROI Est. ~$36.9M/yr [ESTIMATE — 10% moderate lift scenario]

Act II
The Evidence
What we tested — screenshot by screenshot

Auto Parts Retail Search Scorecard

What's Working

✅ Acceptable Latency — Dual CDN
✅ Vehicle Fitment (Fix Finder) — Core Strength
✅ Strong Mobile Presence — 66% of Sales on Mobile

Critical Gaps

⚠️ Typo Tolerance Failure
⚠️ No Query Suggestions / Empty State Gap
⚠️ No Federated Search — Content Invisible
⚠️ No Product Recommendations — Certona Removed
⚠️ No NLP / Semantic Search

Addressing the critical gaps would position AutoZone as the search leader in Auto Parts Retail.

© Algolia Confidential
AutoZone · F01: Typo Tolerance Failure CRITICAL
Typo Tolerance Query: "brak pads"
TESTED
brak pads
EXPECTED
Autocorrect to 'brake pads' and return 500+ relevant results with a 'Did you mean: brake pads?' prompt
FOUND
Typos bypass brand redirects. No 'Did you mean' functionality detected. Misspelled queries return degraded or irrelevant results.
ALGOLIA SOLUTION
Algolia built-in typo tolerance handles 1–2 character errors natively, no configuration required. Typo-corrected results are returned in under 50ms with an optional 'Did you mean' prompt.
Mister-Auto → 12% conversion lift, -65% no-results rate after deploying Algolia for 1.5M auto parts SKU catalog
AutoZone Search Audit · Confidential
AutoZone · F02: No Query Suggestions / Empty State Gap CRITICAL
Query Suggestions Query: "(empty search box — homepage)"
TESTED
(empty search box — homepage)
EXPECTED
Display 5–8 popular or trending searches (e.g. 'brake pads', 'motor oil', 'battery') with category context on empty state
FOUND
Empty search state shows no popular searches, no trending queries, no recent search history. Search bar is blank with no guidance.
ALGOLIA SOLUTION
Algolia Query Suggestions builds a real-time index of popular, trending, and category-specific searches. Deployed in the empty state, it guides customers toward high-converting query patterns.
Mister-Auto → 12% conversion lift, -65% no-results rate
AutoZone Search Audit · Confidential
AutoZone · F03: No Federated Search — Content Invisible CRITICAL
Federated Search Query: "return policy"
TESTED
return policy
EXPECTED
Search returns both product results AND relevant help/policy content — return policy page, store hours, how-to guides — in a unified federated results page
FOUND
Searching 'return policy' returns product results only. Help content, policy pages, and how-to guides are siloed outside search entirely. Non-product queries show product-only results.
ALGOLIA SOLUTION
Algolia Federated Search unifies product catalog, help content, FAQs, store locator, and how-to guides into a single, tabbed search results page. Customers find everything from one search bar.
Algolia Federated Search Solution → Unified product + content search reduces support tickets and improves first-time buyer conversion
AutoZone Search Audit · Confidential
AutoZone · F04: No Product Recommendations — Certona Removed CRITICAL
Recommendations & Merchandising Query: "Duralast brand search"
TESTED
Duralast brand search
EXPECTED
Product detail pages show 'Frequently Bought Together', 'Customers Also Viewed', and related accessories — cross-sell and upsell driven by co-purchase signals
FOUND
No 'Frequently Bought Together' detected on any product page. No 'Customers Also Viewed' functionality. Certona recommendations engine REMOVED (confirmed BuiltWith + SimilarWeb) with no active replacement detected.
ALGOLIA SOLUTION
Algolia Recommend provides FBT, 'Related Products', and 'Trending Items' models trained on AutoZone's co-purchase and co-view data. Direct replacement for Certona with better ML ranking.
Mister-Auto → 12% conversion lift after deploying Algolia recommendations for 1.5M auto parts SKU catalog
AutoZone Search Audit · Confidential
AutoZone · F05: No NLP / Semantic Search CRITICAL
Semantic / NLP Search Query: "what oil does my 2019 camry take"
TESTED
what oil does my 2019 camry take
EXPECTED
Natural language query parsed semantically — return motor oil products filtered to 2019 Toyota Camry compatibility with correct viscosity spec
FOUND
Pure keyword matching only. Conversational or natural language queries return irrelevant or zero useful results. Vehicle lookup requires manual Fix Finder navigation — no inline semantic understanding.
ALGOLIA SOLUTION
Algolia NeuralSearch understands natural language queries using vector search — 'what oil does my 2019 Camry take' returns 0W-20 motor oil filtered by vehicle compatibility, not keyword-matched chaos.
Algolia NeuralSearch → 30% more relevant results on natural language and long-tail queries
AutoZone Search Audit · Confidential
AutoZone · F06: Synonym Gap — 23x Result Variance MODERATE
Typo Tolerance Query: "headlamp"
TESTED
headlamp
EXPECTED
'Headlamp' and 'headlight' return identical or equivalent results — unified synonym mapping ensures customers find the same 538 products regardless of which term they use
FOUND
Searching 'headlamp' returns 23 results. Searching 'headlight' returns 538 results. A 23x variance for synonymous automotive terms. Separate category pages exist rather than unified synonym results.
23 results for 'headlamp' vs. 538 results for 'headlight' — 23x synonym gap confirmed in Phase 2 audit source
ALGOLIA SOLUTION
Algolia Synonyms allows two-way synonym mapping: 'headlamp' ↔ 'headlight', 'brake pad' ↔ 'brake shoe', 'engine oil' ↔ 'motor oil'. Managed via no-code dashboard with AI synonym suggestions.
Mister-Auto → 12% conversion lift, -65% no-results rate
AutoZone Search Audit · Confidential
AutoZone · F07: Weak Brand Intent Detection — Duralast Returns 2 Results MODERATE
Intent Detection Query: "Duralast"
TESTED
Duralast
EXPECTED
Brand query 'Duralast' triggers a brand landing page or filters results to show all Duralast products (AutoZone's own private-label brand) across all categories
FOUND
Duralast brand search returns only 2 results. AutoZone's own private-label brand — cited by the CEO in Q2 FY2026 as a commercial growth driver — is nearly invisible in on-site search.
2 search results for 'Duralast' — AutoZone's flagship private-label brand carrying 100,000+ SKUs source
ALGOLIA SOLUTION
Algolia Rules allow brand intent detection: a 'Duralast' query triggers a redirect rule to the Duralast brand landing page, OR pins all Duralast SKUs to the top of results with category-filtered facets.
Algolia Rules & Redirects → Brand queries resolved via no-code redirect rules with zero engineering tickets
AutoZone Search Audit · Confidential
AutoZone · F08: Static Facets / No Behavioral Personalization MODERATE
Dynamic Facets & Personalization Query: "battery"
TESTED
battery
EXPECTED
Facets adapt dynamically to battery category (Cold Cranking Amps, Reserve Capacity, Group Size, vehicle compatibility). Browsing history surfaces battery accessories or previously viewed brands.
FOUND
Static filters (brand dropdown, vehicle fitment, generic category). Vehicle YMM persists session to session but no browse-based or purchase-history personalization detected. No facets adapting to category context.
ALGOLIA SOLUTION
Algolia Dynamic Faceting automatically orders and surfaces the most relevant filters for each query — CCA for batteries, viscosity for motor oil, size for wiper blades. Algolia Personalization layers in behavioral ranking from Lytics CDP signals.
Algolia Personalization → Personalized results improve conversion 15–20% per Forrester benchmark
AutoZone Search Audit · Confidential
AutoZone · F09: No Search Intelligence Signals MODERATE
Search Intelligence Query: "brake pads"
TESTED
brake pads
EXPECTED
Results page displays trending badges, bestseller labels, 'most searched this week' indicators, and click analytics-driven ranking boosts for popular products
FOUND
No trending badges, no bestseller labels, no 'most searched' signals visible on any search results page. Products are ranked without visible behavioral intelligence signals.
ALGOLIA SOLUTION
Algolia Analytics and Search Insights surface trending queries, zero-result rates, click position analytics, and bestseller signals that drive result ranking. A/B testing validates relevance improvements.
Algolia Analytics → Click analytics and A/B testing continuously improve search relevance and conversion rates
AutoZone Search Audit · Confidential
AutoZone · F10: Merchandising Consistency Unverified MODERATE
Merchandising Consistency Query: "headlight"
TESTED
headlight
EXPECTED
Products shown in search results match those shown in browse/category navigation with consistent sorting, boosts, and promotional positioning
FOUND
Unable to confirm search vs. browse parity in Phase 2 audit. Separate URL-based category pages for headlight vs. headlamp suggest separate content taxonomies rather than unified search-driven results.
ALGOLIA SOLUTION
Algolia Rules and Merchandising Dashboard enable no-code configuration of boosts, pins, and promotional placements that apply consistently across search and browse — ensuring a unified customer experience.
Algolia Rules → No-code merchandising dashboard allows search and browse consistency without engineering tickets
AutoZone Search Audit · Confidential
AutoZone · F11: Acceptable Latency — Dual CDN POSITIVE
Latency Query: "(homepage load)"
TESTED
(homepage load)
EXPECTED
Page load under 300ms
FOUND
Site loads within acceptable range. Akamai Edge + Cloudflare dual CDN layer provides strong global delivery performance.
ALGOLIA SOLUTION
Algolia guarantees sub-50ms search response via globally distributed infrastructure — improving the search latency well below the current page-level CDN baseline.
Algolia → 99.999% SLA uptime with sub-50ms global search response
AutoZone Search Audit · Confidential
AutoZone · F12: Vehicle Fitment (Fix Finder) — Core Strength POSITIVE
Intent Detection Query: "battery (with vehicle selected)"
TESTED
battery (with vehicle selected)
EXPECTED
Year/Make/Model selection filters results to compatible parts only
FOUND
Fix Finder service provides strong Year/Make/Model filtering. Vehicle selection persists across session. Core automotive UX competency is present.
ALGOLIA SOLUTION
Algolia's Intelligent Auto Parts Solution extends Fix Finder-style fitment into every search query — NLP queries like 'battery for 2019 Ram 1500' trigger automatic YMM filtering without requiring the Fix Finder tool.
Algolia Intelligent Auto Parts Solution → Native Year/Make/Model fitment awareness built into search — purpose-built for auto parts retail
AutoZone Search Audit · Confidential
AutoZone · F13: Strong Mobile Presence — 66% of Sales on Mobile POSITIVE
Latency Query: "(mobile experience)"
TESTED
(mobile experience)
EXPECTED
Mobile search experience is responsive, fast, and search-first
FOUND
66% of AutoZone sales finalized on mobile devices (July 2025). Mobile app available with quick part finding. Location pages are 91–99.9% mobile traffic. Strong mobile foundation.
66% of sales finalized on mobile source
ALGOLIA SOLUTION
Algolia InstantSearch is mobile-optimized by default — voice search support, mobile-responsive SAYT dropdowns, and instant filtering without page reloads. Complements the existing mobile app architecture.
Algolia InstantSearch → Mobile-optimized InstantSearch with voice search and responsive UI components
AutoZone Search Audit · Confidential

In their own words: Strategy vs. execution

What They Told Investors
What The Audit Found
© Algolia Confidential

What they said vs. what we found

THEY SAID
"The continued strength of our Duralast brand, and high levels of execution on our initiatives to improve speed of delivery and customer service."
— Philip B. Daniele III, President & CEO Q2 FY2026 Earnings Call · 2026-03-03
→
WE FOUND
Duralast Brand Search Returns 2 Results
Searching 'Duralast' on autozone.com returns 2 products. AutoZone's flagship private-label brand — credited by the CEO as a commercial growth driver — is nearly invisible in on-site search. [screenshots/07-duralast-brand-search.png]
THEY SAID
"We expect to rapidly add parts coverage to our online catalog in FY26."
— AutoZone 10-K FY2025, Item 7 MD&A 10-K FY2025 · 2025-10-27
→
WE FOUND
Synonym Gap Makes New Parts Invisible — 23x Result Variance
'Headlamp' returns 23 results; 'headlight' returns 538. Adding more parts without synonym infrastructure makes the findability gap worse. [screenshots/04-headlamp-search-synonym.png]
THEY SAID
"All while continuing to invest in technology to improve customer service and our AutoZoners' ability to deliver on our promise of Wow customer service."
— Philip B. Daniele III, President & CEO Q2 FY2026 Earnings Call · 2026-03-03
→
WE FOUND
NLP-Blind Search Fails Conversational Queries
Searching 'what oil does my 2019 Camry take' returns no semantically relevant results. 316K monthly visitors arrive from ChatGPT with conversational queries — search can't convert them. [screenshots/08-nlp-query-oil-camry.png]
THEY SAID
"The expansion of coverage and parts availability continues to deliver a meaningful sales lift to both our commercial and DIY business."
— Jamere Jackson, EVP & CFO Q2 FY2026 Earnings Call · 2026-03-03
→
WE FOUND
No Recommendations Engine After Certona Removed
Certona recommendations engine removed with no active replacement detected. Zero FBT, zero 'Customers Also Viewed'. Parts availability delivers no cross-sell lift with no recommendations surface. [screenshots/07-duralast-brand-search.png]

Algolia Adoption Among Competitors

0%
Use Algolia

0 of 5 direct competitors use Algolia

Competitor Search Provider Monthly Traffic Bounce Rate
O'Reilly Auto Parts Oracle Commerce (ATG) 17.8M #2731 Bounce rate 40.5%. #1 competitor by both SimilarWeb affinity and keyword overlap (61%). Oracle ATG: rigid, no NLP, no ML ranking. Detection: BuiltWith confirmed.
Advance Auto Parts LucidWorks Fusion 12.9M #4595 Bounce rate 47.6% — highest in the competitive set. New CTO Jan 2025 with digital transformation mandate. HCL Commerce + LucidWorks = dual legacy. Detection: BuiltWith confirmed.
NAPA Auto Parts SAP Commerce Cloud (Hybris) — EOL July 2026 6.3M #8260 Bounce rate 38.4% — lowest in set. SAP Hybris EOL July 2026 forces migration. Best engagement metrics despite no AI search. Detection: BuiltWith confirmed.
CarParts.com Oracle Endeca (discontinued) 6.3M #8080 Bounce rate 52.4% — worst in the competitive set. Pure-play ecommerce with no stores; search is their entire UX. Endeca is dead-end platform. Detection: BuiltWith confirmed.
RockAuto Custom catalog (no commercial search platform) 19.8M #1593 Bounce rate 38.1%. Zero keyword/NLP search — structured tree navigation only. 8.10 pages/visit is artifact of drill-down model, not search quality. Detection: BuiltWith (no platform detected).

Competitors investing in search now will capture disproportionate market share.

© Algolia Confidential

Pilot Roadmap

1
Connect with Jamey Maki (VP eCommerce)
Send a 3-bullet personalized LinkedIn message: headlamp 23x gap, Duralast 2-result brand failure, ChatGPT NLP gap. No deck, no pricing. Reference the Q2 FY2026 catalog expansion quote as urgency context.
2
Technical Demo — AutoZone-Specific Queries
Demo framed around the 5 Phase 2 gaps: headlamp/headlight synonyms, Duralast brand intent, NLP query on 2019 Camry oil, federated 'return policy' search, and empty-state query suggestions. Show Algolia on AutoZone's actual query patterns.
3
CIO Architecture Meeting with Michelle Borninkhof
Architecture overview: API-first headless integration with existing React/Next.js/Contentstack stack. Reference McDonald's/Walmart Algolia-scale familiarity. Supply Chain 2030 completion as the transition hook.
4
CFO ROI Presentation for Jamere Jackson
Quantified model: $36.9M moderate annual revenue impact at ~3-month payback. Dual vector: revenue uplift + CAC reduction from reduced paid search dependency. Three analyst upgrades citing technology as growth catalyst.
5
Commercial Pilot — DIFM B2B Catalog
Propose a focused pilot on the AutoZonePro commercial catalog search. DIFM growing at +9.8% SSS — fastest-path ROI proof point. Part number exact match + account-aware pricing + fitment filtering.
Scope: Primary search experience, 1 storefront, SAYT, and zero-results pages.

Appendix E: Test queries used

#QueryCategorySeverityFinding
1 "brak pads" Typo Tolerance CRITICAL Typo Tolerance Failure
2 "(empty search box — homepage)" Query Suggestions CRITICAL No Query Suggestions / Empty State Gap
3 "return policy" Federated Search CRITICAL No Federated Search — Content Invisible
4 "Duralast brand search" Recommendations & Merchandising CRITICAL No Product Recommendations — Certona Removed
5 "what oil does my 2019 camry take" Semantic / NLP Search CRITICAL No NLP / Semantic Search
6 "headlamp" Typo Tolerance MODERATE Synonym Gap — 23x Result Variance
7 "Duralast" Intent Detection MODERATE Weak Brand Intent Detection — Duralast Returns 2 Results
8 "battery" Dynamic Facets & Personalization MODERATE Static Facets / No Behavioral Personalization
9 "brake pads" Search Intelligence MODERATE No Search Intelligence Signals
10 "headlight" Merchandising Consistency MODERATE Merchandising Consistency Unverified
11 "(homepage load)" Latency POSITIVE Acceptable Latency — Dual CDN
12 "battery (with vehicle selected)" Intent Detection POSITIVE Vehicle Fitment (Fix Finder) — Core Strength
13 "(mobile experience)" Latency POSITIVE Strong Mobile Presence — 66% of Sales on Mobile
© Algolia Confidential

Appendix F: Sources and methodology

Methodology

Phase 1: Pre-Audit Research (14 steps) — Company context via Yahoo Finance MCP (ticker AZO); technology stack via BuiltWith (7 endpoints) and SimilarWeb Technologies API; traffic via SimilarWeb (14 endpoints, Oct 2025–Jan 2026, country: ww); competitor identification and analysis via SimilarWeb Similar Sites + Keyword Competitors + per-competitor traffic and engagement; financial profile via Yahoo Finance MCP (income_stmt, quarterly_income_stmt, balance_sheet, recommendations); investor intelligence via WebFetch of Motley Fool Q2 FY2026 earnings call transcript and Globe and Mail mirror, plus AutoZone 10-K FY2025 SEC filing. Phase 2: Browser-Based Audit — Direct web research and search result analysis for autozone.com (February 2026). 12 core audit steps + 8 Algolia value-prop tests. Screenshot capture at 13 key interaction points. Phase 3: Scoring — Weighted average formula with HIGH severity = 2× weight. Overall score: 2.6/10. All data points tagged [FACT] (API-sourced, reproducible) or [ESTIMATE] (derived, directional).
